name: QueueMosiData
title: QueueMosiData
description: This method is intended to be used for SPI master simulation. It inserts the given MOSI data into the send queue from the master to the given slave.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The array of bytes that shall be put into the masters send queue. The bytes of the array will be output in the order they are specified. The bits of the bytes will be output MSB first.

parameters.name: Example:
parameters.description: The byte array { 0xD1, 0x3B } will be output as 11010001 00111011.
